title: hieracium alatum subsp. tectosagum
intro: Hieracium alatum subsp. tectosagum, commonly known as the hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium alatum subsp. tectosagum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a valuable remedy in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
